record.field: FreeScout is a self-hosted help desk and shared inbox that turns customer email into organized, collaborative support conversations.

FreeScout is a self-hosted help desk and shared inbox that turns customer email into organized, collaborative support conversations.

Built on PHP and the Laravel framework, FreeScout converts incoming email into trackable conversations within shared mailboxes, letting support teams reply, assign, tag and collaborate from a clean web interface. It is a privacy-respecting alternative to hosted services like Zendesk and Help Scout, with no caps on agents, tickets or mailboxes and a lightweight footprint that runs on modest hardware or shared hosting.

Key features
  • Shared mailboxes that turn email into trackable support conversations
  • Team collaboration with assignments, internal notes and collision detection
  • Conversation management: merge, move, forward and tag threads
  • Auto-replies, push notifications and a built-in workflow/automation engine
  • Modular add-ons for live chat, WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, CRM, SAML/LDAP SSO and more
  • REST API, official iOS/Android apps and 29+ interface languages
Best for

Support, success and operations teams that want professional, multi-channel customer support without per-seat SaaS fees or losing control of their data.

field.name: tag_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_self_hosted'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_email'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_crm'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_communication'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_collaboration'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_productivity'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_helpdesk')])]

record.field: services: freescout-db: image: mariadb:10.6 volumes: - ./freescout_db_data:/var/lib/mysql environment: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: {{ mysql_root_password }} MYSQL_DATABASE: {{ db_name }} MYSQL_USER: {{ db_user }} MYSQL_PASSWORD: {{ db_pass }} healthcheck: test: - CMD - mysqladmin - ping - -h - localhost - -u - root - -p{{ mysql_root_password }} interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_freescout_db' networks: - internal freescout: image: tiredofit/freescout:latest volumes: - ./freescout_data:/data - ./freescout_html:/www/html - ./freescout_logs:/www/logs depends_on: freescout-db: condition: service_healthy environment: - ADMIN_EMAIL={{ admin_email }} - ADMIN_PASS={{ admin_pass }} - ADMIN_FIRST_NAME={{ admin_first_name }} - ADMIN_LAST_NAME={{ admin_last_name }} - SITE_URL={{ site_url }} - DB_HOST=freescout-db - DB_PORT=3306 - DB_TYPE=mysql - DB_NAME={{ db_name }} - DB_USER={{ db_user }} - DB_PASS={{ db_pass }} - APPLICATION_NAME={{ application_name }} - SETUP_TYPE=AUTO - ENABLE_AUTO_UPDATE=TRUE - DISPLAY_ERRORS=FALSE - APP_PROXY={{ app_proxy }} - APP_TRUSTED_PROXIES={{ app_trusted_proxies }} restart: unless-stopped container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:80' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Dump de la base de APLICACIÓN. Clave: usa MYSQL_PWD (env), NUNCA `-p` — con `-p` y # password vacío (apps con MYSQL_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD) mysql espera un prompt por stdin # y CUELGA. Prefiere el usuario de app (MYSQL_USER/PASSWORD/DATABASE); cae a root solo si # no hay usuario de app (excluye schemas de sistema, que romperían la auth al restaurar). docker compose exec -T freescout-db sh -c ' # MariaDB 11+ renombró mysqldump→mariadb-dump y mysql→mariadb: detectamos el binario. DUMP=$(command -v mysqldump || command -v mariadb-dump); CLI=$(command -v mysql || command -v mariadb) if [ -n "${MYSQL_USER:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_DATABASE:-}" ]; then export MYSQL_PWD="$MYSQL_PASSWORD" exec "$DUMP" -u"$MYSQL_USER" --single-transaction --databases "$MYSQL_DATABASE" fi export MYSQL_PWD="${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-}" DBS=$("$CLI" -uroot -N -e "SHOW DATABASES" | grep -Ev "^(mysql|sys|information_schema|performance_schema)$") [ -z "$DBS" ] && { echo "REVISAR: sin bases de aplicacion para respaldar" >&2; exit 0; } exec "$DUMP" -uroot --single-transaction --databases $DBS ' > "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.sql" echo "mysqldump OK ($(wc -c < "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.sql") bytes)"

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" docker compose up -d freescout-db # Readiness + restore en UN exec (credenciales DENTRO del contenedor, con MYSQL_PWD → # jamás cuelga esperando un prompt de password). Prefiere el usuario de app; cae a root. docker compose exec -T freescout-db sh -c ' CLI=$(command -v mysql || command -v mariadb) if [ -n "${MYSQL_USER:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then U="$MYSQL_USER"; export MYSQL_PWD="$MYSQL_PASSWORD"; else U=root; export MYSQL_PWD="${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-}"; fi for i in $(seq 1 60); do "$CLI" -u"$U" -e "SELECT 1" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 2; done exec "$CLI" -u"$U" ' < "$RESTORE_DATA_DIR/db.sql" echo "restore MySQL OK"
